gate.no_task: Clawket: No active task. Run `clawket task create` or `clawket task update <ID> --status in_progress` before making changes.
gate.no_plan:
Clawket PDD Gate 1: No active Plan.
Check plan status with `clawket plan list --cwd .` and activate with `clawket plan update <PLAN-ID> --status active`.
gate.no_cycle:
Clawket PDD Gate 2: No active Cycle.
Check cycle status with `clawket cycle list` and activate with `clawket cycle update <CYCLE-ID> --status active`.
New cycle: `clawket cycle create --unit <UNIT-ID> --title "Round N" --plan <PLAN-ID>`
gate.no_cycle_assignment:
Clawket PDD Gate: Active task has no cycle assigned.
Assign the task to an active cycle first: `clawket task update <TASK-ID> --cycle <CYCLE-ID>`.
gate.all_blocked:
Clawket PDD Gate 3: All active tasks are blocked.
Unblock a dependency or run `clawket task update <ID> --status todo` to reset.
gate.no_agent_task: Clawket: No task assigned to agent "{name}". Register one with `clawket task create --assignee {name}`.
plan_sync.manual:
# Clawket: Plan Mode exited — manual registration required
{fileNote}
Register this plan with Clawket:
1. `clawket plan create "<title>" --project <PROJ-ID>`
2. `clawket unit create "<title>" --plan <PLAN-ID>` — register each Unit
3. `clawket cycle create --unit <UNIT-ID> --plan <PLAN-ID>` — start Cycle
4. `clawket task create "<title>" --cycle <CYCLE-ID> --unit <UNIT-ID>` — first Task
install.setup_error:
[CLAWKET SETUP ERROR] {message}
Run `clawket doctor` to diagnose.
install.rate_limited: GitHub rate limit exceeded — try again after {reset}
install.aborted: Clawket: install incomplete — context injection skipped. Run `clawket doctor` to diagnose.
no_project:
Clawket: No project registered for this directory.
Run: clawket project create "<name>" --cwd "{cwd}"
no_active_task_warning: # Clawket: No active task — register a task before starting work
hook.pre_tool_use.system_error: [Clawket] System error in PreToolUse — falling through to allow. Run `clawket doctor` to diagnose.
install.progress.first_run: [clawket-setup] First-run install (downloading binaries — this can take ~30s)
install.progress.sha_fetch_warn: [clawket-setup] WARNING: could not fetch SHA256SUMS: {message}. Proceeding without integrity check.
install.progress.sha_asset_missing: [clawket-setup] WARNING: {assetName} not found in SHA256SUMS. Skipping integrity check.
